data.body: MILESTONE: 5 of 6 children CLOSED (97f2, aff0, 625b, eefd, 21ca). Close phase required: (1) execution-phase plan-review via material-change (append '## Landed' note) forcing full re-review — drift_refresh preserves planning phase so --force alone insufficient; (2) completion-verifier gate. 625b completion flagged a real gap: an AC I added (absent-baseline no-ancestor) lacked a test on the NEW canonical path -> added test, landed Gerrit 943, re-verified, closed. 625b close UNBLOCKED ad44. aff0 completion needed a plan file-name fix (test_inbound_probe->test_probe_capability). ad44 review BLOCKED (6 findings: AC1 gate needs path-literal check not just AST; description must reuse 625b outbound_field_diff parity via map_fields_to_remote NOT sanitize_description; AC2 annotation-label case is intended improvement). Remediated, re-reviewing.
